page_1_20000_loan_blog.action_today: FIX DEPLOYED — Removed exact answer ($405.53) from FAQ schema. Replaced with CTA-driven responses requiring calculator click. Root cause: FAQ schema showing '$405.53' directly in SERP rich snippet at position 7 — users get answer without clicking.
page_1_20000_loan_blog.expected_effect: Google rich snippet will now show 'Use Loan Calculator to see YOUR payment' instead of '$405.53'. Should improve CTR from 0% to 3-5% at position 7.

overall_assessment.summary: CRITICAL FIX DEPLOYED. The $20k loan blog sits at position 7.0 for its main query with 20 impressions and 0 clicks — a textbook snippet cannibalization case. Google was showing $405.53 directly in the SERP via FAQ rich snippet. Fixed by replacing FAQ answers with CTA-driven responses. However, impressions continue declining (-31% vs previous period) and the retirement decision page collapsed. The fix needs a Google recrawl to take effect — expect 3-14 day lag before measurable CTR improvement. Until then, the project remains OFF_TRACK with 1 click in 28 days.
